# Code Analysis MCP Server

intelops/code-analysis-mcp-server is a containerized MCP server for code analysis workflows. In this repository, it is packaged as a local Docker Compose utility so agents and humans can start and stop it consistently.

This skill exposes the MCP endpoint on port 8000 and mounts one selected local project path into the container for analysis.

## References

- [intelops/code-analysis-mcp-server](https://hub.docker.com/r/intelops/code-analysis-mcp-server)
- [Model Context Protocol](https://modelcontextprotocol.io/)
